scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.restart: npm run stop && npm run start
scripts.restart:backend: npm run stop:backend && npm run start:backend
scripts.restart:frontend: npm run stop:frontend && npm run start:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
